entries.source: Connect the gateway to load channels.
Telegram, WhatsApp, email, and other channels appear here after setup.
Gateway is offline. Open Settings to reconnect.
Catch me up on my recent OpenClaw sessions and suggest next steps.
Help me turn this goal into a practical checklist:
What can you help me do from this phone right now?
Setup code, endpoint, TLS, token, password, onboarding.
Run these on the gateway host:
For Tailscale or public hosts, use wss:// or Tailscale Serve. Private LAN ws:// remains supported.
Turn this on for Tailscale or public hosts. Private LAN ws:// remains supported.
Connect the gateway to load dreaming.
Entries appear after a dreaming cycle writes a narrative summary.
The diary is waiting for its first entry.
Connect the gateway to load recent logs.
Connect the gateway to load nodes and paired devices.
Linked phones and node hosts will appear here after pairing.
Device pairing admin needs elevated access. Connected nodes still work.

Verify the certificate fingerprint before continuing.

${prompt.fingerprintSha256}

Your personal AI assistant.
Exfoliate! Exfoliate!

These permissions keep OpenClaw secure
and useful.
Choose what this phone can share with OpenClaw. You can change these later in Settings.

Approve this phone on the gateway.
Then retry the connection.

Gateway pairing worked.
Approve this phone's node capabilities from an operator UI.

Approval is in progress.
OpenClaw will reconnect automatically.
OpenClaw is checking gateway and node access.

We could not reach your Gateway.
Let's fix this.

Review provider readiness
and configured models.
Connect the gateway to load usage.
Provider limits will appear here when your gateway reports them.
Android shows scheduled work status. Create and edit schedules from the desktop app.
Connect the gateway to load cron jobs.
Create recurring OpenClaw work from the desktop app.
Connect the gateway to load agents.
Connect the gateway to load approval requests in the app.
Exec approval requests will appear here while this phone is connected.
Chat tool calls waiting in the active session remain visible here.
Check that OpenClaw can speak clearly on this phone.
Showing ${visibleApps.size} of ${apps.size}. Refine search for more.
Clear this phone's saved gateway access and scan a fresh setup code.

Android can scan or paste an existing setup code, but this gateway does not expose setup-code generation to the app yet. Generate the QR/code on the gateway host with openclaw qr, then scan it here or paste the setup code below.
Required for `notifications.list`, `notifications.actions`, and forwarded notification events.
Send and search SMS from this device.
Only listed package IDs are forwarded.
All packages except listed IDs are forwarded.
Suppress forwarding during a local time window.
Blank keeps notification events on this device's default notification route. Set a key only to pin forwarding into a different session.
Connect the gateway to load skills.
Skills installed on the gateway will appear here.
Connect the gateway to load skill details.
Skill detail is not available in the current skills status.
Tip: stop listening to send the captured turn.
Your words and OpenClaw replies will appear here.
OpenClaw only listens when you start Talk or Dictation.
Mic sends turns; Talk keeps the conversation open.
share extension does not support node invoke
Refresh reads live state. Maintenance actions update the gateway diary/artifacts.
Search ClawHub and install into this workspace.
The operator session will attach when the gateway is ready.
Select refresh to load the proposal body.
Opens card title and notes entry
Gateway setup, pairing, channels, and mobile node reference.
This disconnects, clears saved gateway credentials, and reopens onboarding.
Gateway, permissions, voice, and device controls.
Controls whether location can be shared with gateway tools.
Used for new Chat and Talk sessions.
No gateways found yet. Use manual setup if Bonjour is blocked.
Discovered gateways and manual setup live here when the gateway has not connected yet.
Run /pair approve in your OpenClaw chat before this iPad can connect.
Review this exec request before continuing. Your decision will be sent back to the gateway.
Enable “Discovery Debug Logs” to start collecting events.
No gateways found yet. Make sure your gateway is running and Bonjour discovery is enabled.
OpenClaw uses your calendars to show events and scheduling context when you enable calendar access.
OpenClaw uses your calendars to add events when you enable calendar access.

OpenClaw uses the camera when you scan a Gateway setup QR code or ask your paired Gateway or assistant to capture a photo or short video from this iPhone, for example to connect to your Gateway or show your assistant a document, device screen, or workspace.
OpenClaw uses your contacts so you can search and reference people while using the assistant.
OpenClaw discovers and connects to your OpenClaw gateway on the local network.
OpenClaw can share your location in the background when you enable Always.
OpenClaw uses your location when you allow location sharing.
OpenClaw uses the microphone for realtime chat, voice wake, and push-to-talk.
OpenClaw may use motion data to support device-aware interactions and automations.
OpenClaw needs photo library access when you choose existing photos to share with your assistant.
OpenClaw uses your reminders to list, add, and complete tasks when you enable reminders access.
OpenClaw uses on-device speech recognition for talk mode and voice wake.
CAMERA_DISABLED: enable Camera in iOS Settings → Camera → Allow Camera
LOCATION_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: enable Always for background access
A2UI_HOST_UNAVAILABLE: bundled A2UI host not reachable
INVALID_REQUEST: operator session cannot invoke node commands
OpenClaw couldn't connect to the gateway operator session.
OpenClaw couldn't resolve this approval right now. Try again.
Turn this device into a secure OpenClaw node for chat, voice, camera, and device tools.
The connected OpenClaw agent can use device capabilities you enable,
Scan a QR code from your OpenClaw gateway or continue with manual setup.
Then scan the QR code here to connect this device.
Default host is localhost. Use your Mac LAN IP if simulator networking requires it.
Gateway rejected credentials. Scan a fresh QR code or update token/password.
Approve this device on the gateway.
Use this if you received a setup code instead of a QR code.
Use Chat for code work, Talk for realtime voice, and gateway tools for approved device actions.
Restoring the local node session, agent list, voice config, and device capability state.
Connect this phone as a local node for chat, realtime voice, share intake, and approved device tools.
OpenClaw reacts when any trigger appears in a transcription.
Realtime closed before it became ready.
Realtime did not become ready in time.
Tap the message pill below to start from your watch.
